faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about buying software licenses
faq.q1: How do I receive my license key?
faq.a1: After successful payment, your license key is displayed immediately on the confirmation page and also sent to your email address.
faq.a2: Yes, all our license keys are 100% genuine, authentic, and sourced from official channels.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept payments through the Iraqi payment gateway, supporting local payment methods.
faq.q4: What if my key doesn't work?
faq.a4: Contact our support team with your order ID and we'll resolve the issue promptly.
faq.a5: Please review our Refund Policy. We handle refund requests on a case-by-case basis.
faq.a6: License key delivery is instant — you receive it immediately after payment confirmation.
faq.q7: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a7: No account needed! Just enter your email at checkout and you'll receive your license key directly.
faq.a8: Yes! Use the 'My Orders' page and enter your email address to view all your orders.
